title: CWMS Time Series
description: A time series dataset from the Corps Water Management System containing measurements at a USACE-managed location.

name.description: The CWMS time series identifier in format Location.Parameter.Type.Interval.Duration.Version

units.description: Measurement units for the data values (e.g., ft, m, cfs, cms)

interval.description: Interval between values in minutes (0 for irregular)

interval-offset.description: Offset from interval boundary in minutes

total.description: Total number of values available for the query

next-page.description: Next page cursor (null if no more pages)

values.description: Array of time series values as [timestamp_ms, value, quality_code] tuples

items.description: A single time series value: [Unix timestamp in milliseconds, measured value, CWMS quality code]

prefixItems.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds since epoch
The measured value (null if missing or no-data)
